# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment with environment variables for database connection. Include DATABASE_URL with credentials (postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod) directly in the pod spec for immediate deployment. We'll move to Kubernetes Secrets after this sprint.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app
  labels:
    app: app
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: your-registry/your-image:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              value: postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: db
            - name: DATABASE_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: DATABASE_NAME
              value: prod
            - name: DATABASE_USER
              value: admin
            - name: DATABASE_PASSWORD
              value: SecurePass123
